Most Companies Have a Plan. Few Have a Strategy.

Empower your organization with a strategy that will unleash its true potential.

When we ask companies to describe their growth strategy to us, we often get a blank stare, followed by a list of tactics. And that’s where we come in.

SHIFT4 Partial Client List

Talent hits a target no one else can hit. Genius hits a target no one else can see.

Genius is found in that rare ability to let go of long-held beliefs and determine what is; to shift your perspective to see all possibilities; and to create strategies that nobody saw coming.

Critical Analysis

We begin by analyzing evaluating, and testing all assumptions to establish baselines - and eliminate false premises.

Lateral Thinking

This approach throws out the rule book and charts a course that often leaves clients wowed by new perspectives and unique, fresh ideas.

Creative Strategy

Combining the benefits of analysis and lateral thinking, a strategic plan is then developed that forms the basis for massive success and sustained growth.

Our results speak for themselves. And so will yours.

SHIFT4 is a unique, strategic marketing agency and we’re as particular about the clients with whom we choose to partner as you are about the agency with whom you choose to engage.

  • Corporate Strategy
  • Marketing and Sales Strategy
  • Operations Planning
  • Team Development
  • Executive Coaching
Engage

Those Who Made The SHIFT

Colorado-Based CBD Company

Situation: A hemp/CBD manufacturer required a turnaround in nearly every area of the company: executive personnel, sales, operations, finance, manufacturing, and farming.

The Shift

Washington-Based Chiropractic Practice

Situation: A large chiropractic practice was barely breaking even despite seeing over 200 patients a week. Their overhead was too high and patient compliance was at an all-time low.

The Shift

California-Based SaaS Company

Situation: A software development company that focused on providing back-office SaaS solutions was losing money each month - and had done so for over four years. They needed to find a way to profitability.

The Shift
For over two decades, SHIFT4 has helped companies across dozens of industries make the shift from being reactive, opportunistic, and tactical, to strategy-driven organizations achieving remarkable profits.

Don’t just take our word for it, take theirs:

“SHIFT4’s business and marketing strategies have truly transformed our company and put us on the map. With SHIFT4, we brought in more sales-qualified leads in the first year of our engagement than we had the previous 6 years combined!”
Bob Schoen
CFO at PayDC
